steps.name: verify
steps.final:
The application code has been successfully created with the following structure:

```
wifi-stats/
├── backend/              # Python FastAPI backend
│   ├── main.py           # WiFi stats endpoint
│   └── requirements.txt  # FastAPI and uvicorn dependencies
├── frontend/             # Next.js frontend
│   ├── app/              # App Router pages
│   │   ├── page.tsx      # WiFi stats display page
│   │   └── api/          # API routes
│   │       └── wifi.ts   # Proxy to backend API
│   ├── package.json      # Next.js dependencies
│   └── (other Next.js files)
└── README.md             # Run instructions
```

The code implements:
- Python backend endpoint `/api/wifi` that parses `airport -I` output
- Next.js frontend that refreshes stats every 3 seconds
- Clean card layout for displaying WiFi metrics
- Error handling in both frontend and backend

To run the app:
1. `cd backend/` and run `uvicorn main:app --reload`
2. `cd frontend/` and run `npm run dev`
3. Visit http://localhost:3000

All required files have been created successfully.
